111: // renewToken calls the /auth/token/renew-self Vault endpoint and returns
112: // the vault.Secret response. This endpoint is accessible with the default
113: // policy in Vault 1.7.2. See
114: // https://www.vaultproject.io/api-docs/auth/token#renew-a-token-self.
115: func (c *client) renewToken() (*vault.Secret, error) {
116: 	const op = "vault.(client).renewToken"
117: 	t, err := c.cl.Auth().Token().RenewSelf(0)
118: 	if err != nil {
119: 		return nil, errors.WrapDeprecated(err, op, errors.WithCode(errors.Unknown), errors.WithMsg(fmt.Sprintf("vault: %s", c.cl.Address())))
120: 	}
121: 	return t, nil
122: }
123: 
124: // revokeToken calls the /auth/token/revoke-self Vault endpoint. This
125: // endpoint is accessible with the default policy in Vault 1.7.2. See
126: // https://www.vaultproject.io/api-docs/auth/token#revoke-a-token-self.
127: func (c *client) revokeToken() error {
128: 	const op = "vault.(client).revokeToken"
129: 	// The `token` parameter is kept for backwards compatibility but is ignored, so use ""
130: 	if err := c.cl.Auth().Token().RevokeSelf(""); err != nil {
131: 		return errors.WrapDeprecated(err, op, errors.WithCode(errors.Unknown), errors.WithMsg(fmt.Sprintf("vault: %s", c.cl.Address())))
132: 	}
133: 	return nil
134: }

136: // renewLease calls the /sys/leases/renew Vault endpoint and returns the
137: // vault.Secret response. This endpoint is accessible with the default
138: // policy in Vault 1.7.2. See
139: // https://www.vaultproject.io/api-docs/system/leases#renew-lease.
140: func (c *client) renewLease(leaseId string, leaseDuration time.Duration) (*vault.Secret, error) {
141: 	const op = "vault.(client).renewLease"
142: 	t, err := c.cl.Sys().Renew(leaseId, int(leaseDuration.Round(time.Second).Seconds()))
143: 	if err != nil {
144: 		return nil, errors.WrapDeprecated(err, op, errors.WithCode(errors.VaultCredentialRequest), errors.WithMsg(fmt.Sprintf("vault: %s", c.cl.Address())))
145: 	}

156: 	}

162: // policy in Vault 1.7.2. See
163: // https://www.vaultproject.io/api-docs/auth/token#lookup-a-token-self.
164: func (c *client) lookupToken() (*vault.Secret, error) {
165: 	const op = "vault.(client).lookupToken"

168: 		return nil, errors.WrapDeprecated(err, op, errors.WithCode(errors.Unknown), errors.WithMsg(fmt.Sprintf("vault: %s", c.cl.Address())))

173: // swapToken replaces the token in the Vault client with t and returns the
174: // token that was replaced.
175: func (c *client) swapToken(new TokenSecret) (old TokenSecret) {
176: 	old = TokenSecret(c.cl.Token())
177: 	c.cl.SetToken(string(new))
178: 	return
179: }

181: func (c *client) get(path string) (*vault.Secret, error) {
182: 	const op = "vault.(client).get"
183: 	s, err := c.cl.Logical().Read(path)
184: 	if err != nil {
185: 		return nil, errors.WrapDeprecated(err, op, errors.WithCode(errors.VaultCredentialRequest), errors.WithMsg(fmt.Sprintf("vault: %s", c.cl.Address())))
186: 	}
187: 	return s, nil
188: }

190: func (c *client) post(path string, data []byte) (*vault.Secret, error) {
191: 	const op = "vault.(client).post"
192: 
193: 	if len(data) == 0 {
194: 		// For POST and PUT methods, Vault requires a valid JSON object be
195: 		// sent even if the JSON object is empty
196: 		data = []byte(`{}`)
197: 	}
198: 	s, err := c.cl.Logical().WriteBytes(path, data)
199: 	if err != nil {
200: 		return nil, errors.WrapDeprecated(err, op, errors.WithCode(errors.VaultCredentialRequest), errors.WithMsg(fmt.Sprintf("vault: %s", c.cl.Address())))
201: 	}
202: 	return s, nil
203: }

205: // capabilities calls the /sys/capabilities-self Vault endpoint and returns
206: // the vault.Secret response. This endpoint is accessible with the default
207: // policy in Vault 1.7.2. See
208: // https://www.vaultproject.io/api-docs/system/capabilities-self.
209: func (c *client) capabilities(paths []string) (pathCapabilities, error) {
210: 	const op = "vault.(client).capabilities"
211: 	if len(paths) == 0 {
212: 		return nil, errors.NewDeprecated(errors.InvalidParameter, op, "empty paths")
213: 	}
214: 	body := map[string]string{
215: 		"paths": strings.Join(paths, ","),
216: 	}
217: 	reqPath := "/v1/sys/capabilities-self"
218: 
219: 	r := c.cl.NewRequest("POST", reqPath)
220: 	if err := r.SetJSONBody(body); err != nil {
221: 		return nil, err
222: 	}
223: 
224: 	ctx, cancelFunc := context.WithCancel(context.Background())
225: 	defer cancelFunc()
226: 	resp, err := c.cl.RawRequestWithContext(ctx, r)
227: 	if err != nil {
228: 		return nil, err
229: 	}
230: 	defer resp.Body.Close()
231: 
232: 	secret, err := vault.ParseSecret(resp.Body)
233: 	if err != nil {
234: 		return nil, err
235: 	}
236: 	if secret == nil || secret.Data == nil {
237: 		return nil, errors.NewDeprecated(errors.Unknown, op, "data from Vault is empty")
238: 	}
239: 
240: 	var res map[string][]string
241: 	if err := mapstructure.Decode(secret.Data, &res); err != nil {
242: 		return nil, err
243: 	}
244: 
245: 	return newPathCapabilities(res), nil
246: }

211: func validateTokenLookup(op errors.Op, s *vault.Secret) error {
212: 	if s.Data == nil {
213: 		return errors.NewDeprecated(errors.InvalidParameter, op, "vault secret is not a token lookup")
214: 	}
215: 
216: 	if s.Data["renewable"] == nil {
217: 		return errors.EDeprecated(errors.WithCode(errors.VaultTokenNotRenewable), errors.WithOp(op))
218: 	}
219: 	renewable, err := parseutil.ParseBool(s.Data["renewable"])
220: 	if err != nil {
221: 		return errors.WrapDeprecated(err, op)
222: 	}
223: 	if !renewable {
224: 		return errors.EDeprecated(errors.WithCode(errors.VaultTokenNotRenewable), errors.WithOp(op))
225: 	}
226: 
227: 	if s.Data["orphan"] == nil {
228: 		return errors.EDeprecated(errors.WithCode(errors.VaultTokenNotOrphan), errors.WithOp(op))
229: 	}
230: 	orphan, err := parseutil.ParseBool(s.Data["orphan"])
231: 	if err != nil {
232: 		return errors.WrapDeprecated(err, op)
233: 	}
234: 	if !orphan {
235: 		return errors.EDeprecated(errors.WithCode(errors.VaultTokenNotOrphan), errors.WithOp(op))
236: 	}
237: 
238: 	if s.Data["period"] == nil {
239: 		return errors.EDeprecated(errors.WithCode(errors.VaultTokenNotPeriodic), errors.WithOp(op))
240: 	}
241: 
242: 	return nil
243: }

245: // LookupCredentialStore returns the CredentialStore for publicId. Returns
246: // nil, nil if no CredentialStore is found for publicId.
247: func (r *Repository) LookupCredentialStore(ctx context.Context, publicId string, _ ...Option) (*CredentialStore, error) {
248: 	const op = "vault.(Repository).LookupCredentialStore"
249: 	if publicId == "" {
250: 		return nil, errors.New(ctx, errors.InvalidParameter, op, "no public id")
251: 	}
252: 	agg := allocPublicStore()
253: 	agg.PublicId = publicId
254: 	if err := r.reader.LookupByPublicId(ctx, agg); err != nil {
255: 		if errors.IsNotFoundError(err) {
256: 			return nil, nil
257: 		}
258: 		return nil, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg(fmt.Sprintf("failed for: %s", publicId)))
259: 	}
260: 	return agg.toCredentialStore(), nil
261: }
262: 
263: type publicStore struct {
264: 	PublicId             string `gorm:"primary_key"`
265: 	ProjectId            string
266: 	Name                 string
267: 	Description          string
268: 	CreateTime           *timestamp.Timestamp
269: 	UpdateTime           *timestamp.Timestamp
270: 	Version              uint32
271: 	VaultAddress         string
272: 	Namespace            string
273: 	CaCert               []byte
274: 	TlsServerName        string
275: 	TlsSkipVerify        bool
276: 	WorkerFilter         string
277: 	TokenHmac            []byte
278: 	TokenCreateTime      *timestamp.Timestamp
279: 	TokenUpdateTime      *timestamp.Timestamp
280: 	TokenLastRenewalTime *timestamp.Timestamp
281: 	TokenExpirationTime  *timestamp.Timestamp
282: 	ClientCert           []byte
283: 	ClientCertKeyHmac    []byte
284: }
285: 
286: func allocPublicStore() *publicStore {
287: 	return &publicStore{}
288: }
289: 
290: func (ps *publicStore) toCredentialStore() *CredentialStore {
291: 	cs := allocCredentialStore()
292: 	cs.PublicId = ps.PublicId
293: 	cs.ProjectId = ps.ProjectId
294: 	cs.Name = ps.Name
295: 	cs.Description = ps.Description
296: 	cs.CreateTime = ps.CreateTime
297: 	cs.UpdateTime = ps.UpdateTime
298: 	cs.Version = ps.Version
299: 	cs.VaultAddress = ps.VaultAddress
300: 	cs.Namespace = ps.Namespace
301: 	cs.CaCert = ps.CaCert
302: 	cs.TlsServerName = ps.TlsServerName
303: 	cs.TlsSkipVerify = ps.TlsSkipVerify
304: 	cs.WorkerFilter = ps.WorkerFilter
305: 
306: 	if ps.TokenHmac != nil {
307: 		tk := allocToken()
308: 		tk.TokenHmac = ps.TokenHmac
309: 		tk.LastRenewalTime = ps.TokenLastRenewalTime
310: 		tk.ExpirationTime = ps.TokenExpirationTime
311: 		tk.CreateTime = ps.TokenCreateTime
312: 		tk.UpdateTime = ps.TokenUpdateTime
313: 		cs.outputToken = tk
314: 	}
315: 
316: 	if ps.ClientCert != nil {
317: 		cert := allocClientCertificate()
318: 		cert.Certificate = ps.ClientCert
319: 		cert.CertificateKeyHmac = ps.ClientCertKeyHmac
320: 		cs.clientCert = cert
321: 	}
322: 	return cs
323: }

325: // TableName returns the table name for gorm.
326: func (_ *publicStore) TableName() string { return "credential_vault_store_public" }
327: 
328: // GetPublicId returns the public id.
329: func (ps *publicStore) GetPublicId() string { return ps.PublicId }
330: 
331: // UpdateCredentialStore updates the repository entry for cs.PublicId with
332: // the values in cs for the fields listed in fieldMaskPaths. It returns a
333: // new CredentialStore containing the updated values and a count of the
334: // number of records updated. cs is not changed.
335: //
336: // cs must contain a valid PublicId. Only Name, Description, Namespace,
337: // TlsServerName, TlsSkipVerify, CaCert, VaultAddress, ClientCertificate,
338: // ClientCertificateKey, workerFilter, and Token can be changed. If cs.Name is set to a
339: // non-empty string, it must be unique within cs.Projectid. If Token is changed,
340: // the new token must have the same properties defined in CreateCredentialStore
341: // and UpdateCredentialStore calls the same Vault endpoints described in
342: // CreateCredentialStore.
343: //
344: // An attribute of cs will be set to NULL in the database if the attribute
345: // in cs is the zero value and it is included in fieldMaskPaths.
346: func (r *Repository) UpdateCredentialStore(ctx context.Context, cs *CredentialStore, version uint32, fieldMaskPaths []string, _ ...Option) (*CredentialStore, int, error) {
347: 	const op = "vault.(Repository).UpdateCredentialStore"
348: 	if cs == nil {
349: 		return nil, db.NoRowsAffected, errors.New(ctx, errors.InvalidParameter, op, "missing CredentialStore")
350: 	}
351: 	if cs.CredentialStore == nil {
352: 		return nil, db.NoRowsAffected, errors.New(ctx, errors.InvalidParameter, op, "missing embedded CredentialStore")
353: 	}
354: 	if cs.PublicId == "" {
355: 		return nil, db.NoRowsAffected, errors.New(ctx, errors.InvalidPublicId, op, "missing public id")
356: 	}
357: 	if version == 0 {
358: 		return nil, db.NoRowsAffected, errors.New(ctx, errors.InvalidParameter, op, "missing version")
359: 	}
360: 	if cs.ProjectId == "" {
361: 		return nil, db.NoRowsAffected, errors.New(ctx, errors.InvalidParameter, op, "missing project id")
362: 	}
363: 	cs = cs.clone()
364: 
365: 	var validateToken, updateToken bool
366: 	for _, f := range fieldMaskPaths {
367: 		switch {
368: 		case strings.EqualFold(nameField, f):
369: 		case strings.EqualFold(descriptionField, f):
370: 		case strings.EqualFold(namespaceField, f):
371: 		case strings.EqualFold(tlsServerNameField, f):
372: 		case strings.EqualFold(tlsSkipVerifyField, f):
373: 		case strings.EqualFold(workerFilterField, f):
374: 		case strings.EqualFold(caCertField, f):
375: 		case strings.EqualFold(vaultAddressField, f):
376: 			validateToken = true
377: 		case strings.EqualFold(certificateField, f):
378: 		case strings.EqualFold(certificateKeyField, f):
379: 		case strings.EqualFold(tokenField, f):
380: 			if len(cs.inputToken) != 0 {
381: 				updateToken = true
382: 				validateToken = true
383: 			}
384: 		default:
385: 			return nil, db.NoRowsAffected, errors.New(ctx, errors.InvalidFieldMask, op, f)
386: 		}
387: 	}
388: 	dbMask, nullFields := dbw.BuildUpdatePaths(
389: 		map[string]interface{}{
390: 			nameField:          cs.Name,
391: 			descriptionField:   cs.Description,
392: 			namespaceField:     cs.Namespace,
393: 			tlsServerNameField: cs.TlsServerName,
394: 			tlsSkipVerifyField: cs.TlsSkipVerify,
395: 			workerFilterField:  cs.WorkerFilter,
396: 			caCertField:        cs.CaCert,
397: 			vaultAddressField:  cs.VaultAddress,
398: 			tokenField:         cs.inputToken,
399: 		},
400: 		fieldMaskPaths,
401: 		[]string{
402: 			tlsSkipVerifyField,
403: 		},
404: 	)
405: 	var clientCert, clientCertKey []byte
406: 	if cs.ClientCertificate() != nil {
407: 		clientCert = cs.ClientCertificate().GetCertificate()
408: 		clientCertKey = cs.ClientCertificate().GetCertificateKey()
409: 	}
410: 	certDbMask, certNullFields := dbw.BuildUpdatePaths(
411: 		map[string]interface{}{
412: 			certificateField:    clientCert,
413: 			certificateKeyField: clientCertKey,
414: 		},
415: 		fieldMaskPaths, nil,
416: 	)
417: 	if len(certNullFields) != 0 && len(certNullFields) != 2 {
418: 		return nil, db.NoRowsAffected, errors.New(ctx, errors.InvalidParameter, op, "attempting to unset a required field on a client cert")
419: 	}
420: 	if len(append(dbMask, certDbMask...)) == 0 && len(append(nullFields, certNullFields...)) == 0 {
421: 		return nil, db.NoRowsAffected, errors.New(ctx, errors.EmptyFieldMask, op, "missing field mask")
422: 	}
423: 
424: 	var filteredDbMask, filteredNullFields []string
425: 	for _, f := range dbMask {
426: 		switch {
427: 		case strings.EqualFold(tokenField, f):
428: 		default:
429: 			filteredDbMask = append(filteredDbMask, f)
430: 		}
431: 	}
432: 	for _, f := range nullFields {
433: 		switch {
434: 		case strings.EqualFold(tokenField, f):
435: 			return nil, db.NoRowsAffected, errors.New(ctx, errors.InvalidParameter, op, "attempting to unset the value for token")
436: 		default:
437: 			filteredNullFields = append(filteredNullFields, f)
438: 		}
439: 	}
440: 
441: 	oplogWrapper, err := r.kms.GetWrapper(ctx, cs.ProjectId, kms.KeyPurposeOplog)
442: 	if err != nil {
443: 		return nil, db.NoRowsAffected,
444: 			errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg("unable to get oplog wrapper"))
445: 	}
446: 	databaseWrapper, err := r.kms.GetWrapper(ctx, cs.ProjectId, kms.KeyPurposeDatabase)
447: 	if err != nil {
448: 		return nil, db.NoRowsAffected,
449: 			errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg("unable to get database wrapper"))
450: 	}
451: 
452: 	ps, err := r.lookupPrivateStore(ctx, cs.GetPublicId())
453: 	if err != nil {
454: 		return nil, db.NoRowsAffected, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg("unable to lookup private credential store"))
455: 	}
456: 	if ps == nil {
457: 		return nil, db.NoRowsAffected, errors.New(ctx, errors.RecordNotFound, op, fmt.Sprintf("credential store %s", cs.PublicId))
458: 	}
459: 	origStore := ps.toCredentialStore()
460: 	origStore.inputToken = ps.Token
461: 	if len(ps.ClientCert) > 0 {
462: 		origStore.clientCert, err = NewClientCertificate(ps.ClientCert, ps.ClientKey)
463: 	}
464: 	if err != nil {
465: 		return nil, db.NoRowsAffected, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg("can't recreate client certificate for vault client creation"))
466: 	}
467: 	updatedStore := origStore.applyUpdate(cs, fieldMaskPaths)
468: 
469: 	if len(certDbMask) > 0 && updatedStore.clientCert != nil {
470: 		if err := updatedStore.clientCert.encrypt(ctx, databaseWrapper); err != nil {
471: 			return nil, db.NoRowsAffected, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op)
472: 		}
473: 	}
474: 
475: 	var token *Token
476: 	client, err := updatedStore.client()
477: 	if err != nil {
478: 		return nil, db.NoRowsAffected, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg("unable to get client for updated store"))
479: 	}
480: 	if validateToken {
481: 		tokenLookup, err := client.lookupToken()
482: 		if err != nil {
483: 			return nil, db.NoRowsAffected, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg("cannot lookup token for updated store"))
484: 		}
485: 		if err := validateTokenLookup(op, tokenLookup); err != nil {
486: 			return nil, db.NoRowsAffected, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op)
487: 		}
488: 
489: 		available, err := client.capabilities(requiredCapabilities.paths())
490: 		if err != nil {
491: 			return nil, db.NoRowsAffected, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg("unable to get vault capabilities"))
492: 		}
493: 		missing := available.missing(requiredCapabilities)
494: 		if len(missing) > 0 {
495: 			return nil,
496: 				db.NoRowsAffected,
497: 				errors.New(ctx, errors.VaultTokenMissingCapabilities, op, fmt.Sprintf("missing capabilites: %v", missing))
498: 		}
499: 	}
500: 	if updateToken {
501: 		renewedToken, err := client.renewToken()
502: 		if err != nil {
503: 			return nil, db.NoRowsAffected, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg("unable to renew vault token"))
504: 		}
505: 		tokenExpires, err := renewedToken.TokenTTL()
506: 		if err != nil {
507: 			return nil, db.NoRowsAffected, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg("unable to get vault token expiration"))
508: 		}
509: 		accessor, err := renewedToken.TokenAccessor()
510: 		if err != nil {
511: 			return nil, db.NoRowsAffected, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg("unable to get vault token accessor"))
512: 		}
513: 		if token, err = newToken(cs.GetPublicId(), cs.inputToken, []byte(accessor), tokenExpires); err != nil {
514: 			return nil, db.NoRowsAffected, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op)
515: 		}
516: 		// encrypt token
517: 		if err := token.encrypt(ctx, databaseWrapper); err != nil {
518: 			return nil, db.NoRowsAffected, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op)
519: 		}
520: 	}
521: 
522: 	var rowsUpdated int
523: 	var returnedCredentialStore *CredentialStore
524: 	_, err = r.writer.DoTx(ctx, db.StdRetryCnt, db.ExpBackoff{},
525: 		func(reader db.Reader, w db.Writer) error {
526: 			msgs := make([]*oplog.Message, 0, 3)
527: 			ticket, err := w.GetTicket(ctx, cs)
528: 			if err != nil {
529: 				return errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg("unable to get ticket"))
530: 			}
531: 
532: 			cs := cs.clone()
533: 			var csOplogMsg oplog.Message
534: 
535: 			switch {
536: 			case len(filteredDbMask) == 0 && len(filteredNullFields) == 0:
537: 				// the credential store's fields are not being updated,
538: 				// just it's token or client certificate, so we need to
539: 				// just update the credential store's version.
540: 				cs.Version = version + 1
541: 				rowsUpdated, err = w.Update(ctx, cs, []string{"Version"}, nil, db.NewOplogMsg(&csOplogMsg), db.WithVersion(&version))
542: 				if err != nil {
543: 					return errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg("unable to update credential store version"))
544: 				}
545: 				switch rowsUpdated {
546: 				case 1:
547: 				case 0:
548: 					return nil
549: 				default:
550: 					return errors.New(ctx, errors.MultipleRecords, op, fmt.Sprintf("updated credential store version and %d rows updated", rowsUpdated))
551: 				}
552: 			default:
553: 				rowsUpdated, err = w.Update(ctx, cs, filteredDbMask, filteredNullFields, db.NewOplogMsg(&csOplogMsg), db.WithVersion(&version))
554: 				if err != nil {
555: 					if errors.IsUniqueError(err) {
556: 						return errors.New(ctx, errors.NotUnique, op,
557: 							fmt.Sprintf("name %s already exists: %s", cs.Name, cs.PublicId))
558: 					}
559: 					return errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg("unable to update credential store"))
560: 				}
561: 				switch rowsUpdated {
562: 				case 1:
563: 				case 0:
564: 					return nil
565: 				default:
566: 					return errors.New(ctx, errors.MultipleRecords, op, fmt.Sprintf("updated credential store and %d rows updated", rowsUpdated))
567: 				}
568: 			}
569: 			msgs = append(msgs, &csOplogMsg)
570: 
571: 			switch {
572: 			case len(certNullFields) == 2:
573: 				// Delete the certificate
574: 				deleteCert := allocClientCertificate()
575: 				deleteCert.StoreId = cs.GetPublicId()
576: 				query, values := deleteCert.deleteQuery()
577: 				rows, err := w.Exec(ctx, query, values)
578: 				if err != nil {
579: 					return errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg("unable to delete client certificate"))
580: 				}
581: 				if rows > 1 {
582: 					return errors.New(ctx, errors.MultipleRecords, op, "more than 1 client certificate would have been deleted")
583: 				}
584: 				msgs = append(msgs, deleteCert.oplogMessage(db.DeleteOp))
585: 			case len(certDbMask) > 0:
586: 				if updatedStore.clientCert == nil {
587: 					return errors.New(ctx, errors.InvalidParameter, op, "updated cert")
588: 				}
589: 				query, values := updatedStore.clientCert.insertQuery()
590: 				rows, err := w.Exec(ctx, query, values)
591: 				if err != nil {
592: 					return errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg("unable to upsert client certificate"))
593: 				}
594: 				if rows > 1 {
595: 					return errors.New(ctx, errors.MultipleRecords, op, "more than 1 client certificate would have been upserted")
596: 				}
597: 			}
598: 
599: 			if updateToken {
600: 				query, values := token.insertQuery()
601: 				rows, err := w.Exec(ctx, query, values)
602: 				if err != nil {
603: 					if errors.IsUniqueError(err) {
604: 						return errors.New(ctx, errors.NotUnique, op,
605: 							fmt.Sprintf("token already exists"))
606: 					}
607: 					return errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op)
608: 				}
609: 				if rows > 1 {
610: 					return errors.New(ctx, errors.MultipleRecords, op, "more than 1 token would have been created")
611: 				}
612: 				msgs = append(msgs, token.oplogMessage(db.CreateOp))
613: 			}
614: 
615: 			publicId := cs.PublicId
616: 			agg := allocPublicStore()
617: 			agg.PublicId = publicId
618: 			if err := reader.LookupByPublicId(ctx, agg); err != nil {
619: 				return errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg(fmt.Sprintf("unable to lookup credential store: %s", publicId)))
620: 			}
621: 			returnedCredentialStore = agg.toCredentialStore()
622: 
623: 			metadata := cs.oplog(oplog.OpType_OP_TYPE_UPDATE)
624: 			if err := w.WriteOplogEntryWith(ctx, oplogWrapper, ticket, metadata, msgs); err != nil {
625: 				return errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg("unable to write oplog"))
626: 			}
627: 			return nil
628: 		},
629: 	)
630: 
631: 	if err != nil {
632: 		return nil, db.NoRowsAffected, err
633: 	}
634: 
635: 	if updateToken && token != nil {
636: 		// Best effort update next run time of token renewal job, but an error should not
637: 		// cause update to fail.
638: 		// TODO (lcr 05/2021): log error once repo has logger
639: 		_ = r.scheduler.UpdateJobNextRunInAtLeast(ctx, tokenRenewalJobName, token.renewalIn())
640: 	}
641: 
642: 	return returnedCredentialStore, rowsUpdated, nil
643: }
644: 
645: // ListCredentialStores returns a slice of CredentialStores for the
646: // projectIds. WithLimit is the only option supported.
647: func (r *Repository) ListCredentialStores(ctx context.Context, projectIds []string, opt ...Option) ([]*CredentialStore, error) {
648: 	const op = "vault.(Repository).ListCredentialStores"
649: 	if len(projectIds) == 0 {
650: 		return nil, errors.New(ctx, errors.InvalidParameter, op, "no projectIds")
651: 	}
652: 	opts := getOpts(opt...)
653: 	limit := r.defaultLimit
654: 	if opts.withLimit != 0 {
655: 		// non-zero signals an override of the default limit for the repo.
656: 		limit = opts.withLimit
657: 	}
658: 	var credentialStores []*publicStore
659: 	err := r.reader.SearchWhere(ctx, &credentialStores, "project_id in (?)", []interface{}{projectIds}, db.WithLimit(limit))
660: 	if err != nil {
661: 		return nil, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op)
662: 	}
663: 	var out []*CredentialStore
664: 	for _, ca := range credentialStores {
665: 		out = append(out, ca.toCredentialStore())
666: 	}
667: 	return out, nil
668: }
669: 
670: // DeleteCredentialStore deletes publicId from the repository and returns
671: // the number of records deleted. All options are ignored.
672: func (r *Repository) DeleteCredentialStore(ctx context.Context, publicId string, _ ...Option) (int, error) {
673: 	const op = "vault.(Repository).DeleteCredentialStore"
674: 	if publicId == "" {
675: 		return db.NoRowsAffected, errors.New(ctx, errors.InvalidParameter, op, "no public id")
676: 	}
677: 
678: 	cs := allocCredentialStore()
679: 	cs.PublicId = publicId
680: 	if err := r.reader.LookupByPublicId(ctx, cs); err != nil {
681: 		if errors.IsNotFoundError(err) {
682: 			return db.NoRowsAffected, nil
683: 		}
684: 		return db.NoRowsAffected, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg(fmt.Sprintf("failed for %s", publicId)))
685: 	}
686: 	if cs.ProjectId == "" {
687: 		return db.NoRowsAffected, errors.New(ctx, errors.InvalidParameter, op, "no project id")
688: 	}
689: 
690: 	oplogWrapper, err := r.kms.GetWrapper(ctx, cs.ProjectId, kms.KeyPurposeOplog)
691: 	if err != nil {
692: 		return db.NoRowsAffected, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg("unable to get oplog wrapper"))
693: 	}
694: 
695: 	var rows int
696: 	query, values := cs.softDeleteQuery()
697: 	_, err = r.writer.DoTx(
698: 		ctx, db.StdRetryCnt, db.ExpBackoff{},
699: 		func(_ db.Reader, w db.Writer) (err error) {
700: 			var msgs []*oplog.Message
701: 			ticket, err := w.GetTicket(ctx, cs)
702: 			if err != nil {
703: 				return errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg("unable to get ticket"))
704: 			}
705: 
706: 			rows, err = w.Exec(ctx, query, values)
707: 			if err != nil {
708: 				return errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op)
709: 			}
710: 			if rows > 1 {
711: 				return errors.New(ctx, errors.MultipleRecords, op, "more than 1 credential store would have been deleted")
712: 			}
713: 			msg := cs.oplogMessage(db.UpdateOp)
714: 			msg.FieldMaskPaths = []string{"DeleteTime"}
715: 			msgs = append(msgs, msg)
716: 
717: 			metadata := cs.oplog(oplog.OpType_OP_TYPE_UPDATE)
718: 			if err := w.WriteOplogEntryWith(ctx, oplogWrapper, ticket, metadata, msgs); err != nil {
719: 				return errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg("unable to write oplog"))
720: 			}
721: 
722: 			return nil
723: 		},
724: 	)
725: 
726: 	if err != nil {
727: 		return db.NoRowsAffected, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg(fmt.Sprintf("delete failed for %s", cs.PublicId)))
728: 	}
729: 
730: 	if rows > 0 {
731: 		// Schedule token revocation and credential store cleanup jobs to run immediately
732: 		_ = r.scheduler.UpdateJobNextRunInAtLeast(ctx, tokenRevocationJobName, 0, scheduler.WithRunNow(true))
733: 		_ = r.scheduler.UpdateJobNextRunInAtLeast(ctx, credentialStoreCleanupJobName, 0, scheduler.WithRunNow(true))
734: 	}
735: 	return rows, nil
736: }

(End of file - total 736 lines)
